description: All images required for the new Marble Polishing, Painting, and AMC Services. Images should be uploaded to the GitHub repo at: generated_images/<filename>.webp
naming_convention: Service name with spaces replaced by underscores, '&' replaced by 'and', commas removed. Extension: .webp

images.image_prompt: Professional worker polishing a white marble floor with an industrial floor polishing machine, sparkling clean marble surface reflecting light, modern luxury home interior, warm lighting, editorial photography style, clean and bright, 16:9 landscape aspect ratio

Close-up of a technician polishing dark granite countertop surface with a handheld polishing tool, shiny restored granite reflecting ambient light, modern kitchen background, professional service photography, warm tones, 16:9 landscape aspect ratio

Professional applying crystallization chemical treatment to a beige marble floor in a luxury hotel lobby, glossy mirror-like marble surface, chemical spray and buffing machine visible, elegant interior, professional photography, 16:9 landscape aspect ratio

Professional painter in clean overalls applying fresh pastel paint to interior living room wall with a roller, paint tray and supplies nearby, partially painted wall showing before-after, modern apartment interior, bright natural lighting, editorial style, 16:9 landscape aspect ratio

Professional painter on scaffolding painting exterior wall of a modern residential building, vibrant fresh paint color, blue sky background, safety equipment visible, wide angle architectural photography, bright daylight, 16:9 landscape aspect ratio

Skilled artisan applying textured decorative wall finish with a trowel, beautiful metallic gold and bronze texture pattern on accent wall, modern luxury living room setting, artistic close-up, warm ambient lighting, editorial photography, 16:9 landscape aspect ratio

Professional painter carefully painting wooden door frame with a fine brush, freshly painted wood with smooth glossy finish, workshop or home renovation setting, paint cans and brushes arranged neatly, warm lighting, editorial photography, 16:9 landscape aspect ratio

Technician applying waterproof coating to bathroom wall with a brush roller, visible waterproofing membrane layer in blue or green, construction and renovation setting, professional tools nearby, bright even lighting, technical photography style, 16:9 landscape aspect ratio

Professional technician in branded uniform inspecting home electrical panel with a clipboard and flashlight, organized tools in belt, modern home interior, focused and professional demeanor, clean documentary photography style, warm lighting, 16:9 landscape aspect ratio

Uniformed cleaning team performing scheduled deep cleaning in a modern office space, vacuum cleaner and mop in use, clean organized environment, professional maintenance service atmosphere, bright and fresh look, editorial photography, 16:9 landscape aspect ratio

Maintenance technician adjusting door hinges and tightening fixtures in a modern home, small toolbox with screwdrivers and wrenches, focused hands-on work, clean residential interior, natural lighting, professional service photography, 16:9 landscape aspect ratio

Technician testing electrical outlets and switches with a multimeter in a modern apartment, safety equipment visible, systematic testing procedure, organized and professional scene, well-lit interior, technical documentary photography style, 16:9 landscape aspect ratio

Handyman fixing a leaky kitchen faucet with proper tools, small repair toolkit nearby, modern kitchen interior, close-up of skilled hands working, clean and professional maintenance scene, warm natural lighting, editorial photography, 16:9 landscape aspect ratio
